antipattern.symptom: Register has 80 rows; nobody knows which ones are active.
antipattern.root-cause: Cap not enforced; archive policy unwritten.
antipattern.fix: Hard cap to 30; bulk-close rows past 90 days; force re-add if still relevant.

antipattern.symptom: Rows without Fowler quadrant; action unclear.
antipattern.fix: Block commit until quadrant filled; reviewer enforces.
